2026-06-06.content: June 5 (Reuters) - Marvell Technology (MRVL.O), opens new tab is set to join the benchmark S&P 500 (.SPX), opens new tab later this month, S&P ​Dow Jones Indices said on Friday, after the chipmaker cleared a ‌key profitability hurdle riding an AI-fueled rally.
